basic_details.job_title: NIPER Ahmedabad Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research (NIPER Ahmedabad) Project Research Scientist I Notification 2026 has been released on 13-05-2026 on the official website NIPER Ahmedabad. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIPER Ahmedabad Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: First-class postgraduate degree including the integrated PG degree. Second-class postgraduate degree, including the integrated PG degree with Ph.D.

salary_details.details: Rs. 56,000/- p.m. plus HRA as applicable

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIPER Ahmedabad Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIPER Ahmedabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIPER Ahmedabad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NIPER Ahmedabad Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) recruitment is 28th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post in the NIPER Ahmedabad recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a first-class postgraduate degree including the integrated PG degree, or a second-class postgraduate degree including the integrated PG degree with a Ph.D.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 56,000/- per month plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the NIPER Ahmedabad recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a screening followed by an interview, which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted online.

faq.question: Q8. In which city is NIPER Ahmedabad located?
faq.answer: NIPER Ahmedabad is located in Ahmedabad, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 2026/008.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section on this page, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
